/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O2  -fPIE -fstack-protector-strong -fPIC -fno-operator-names -Wformat -Wformat-security -Wall -DJAZZY -DCV_BRDIGE_HAS_HPP -DRCLCPP_HAS_OnSetParametersCallbackType -O3 -DNDEBUG -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2  -z noexecstack -z relro -z now -shared -Wl,-soname,librealsense2_camera.so -o librealsense2_camera.so CMakeFiles/realsense2_camera.dir/src/realsense_node_factory.cpp.o
